name: ESPHome Core Configuration
description: Here you specify some core information that ESPHome needs to create firmwares. Most importantly, this is the section of the configuration where you specify the **name** of the node.

config_entries.label: Name
config_entries.description: This is the name of the node. It should always be unique in your ESPHome network. May only contain lowercase characters, digits and hyphens, and can be at most 24 characters long by default, or 31 characters long if `name_add_mac_suffix` is `false`. See [Changing ESPHome Node Name](https://esphome.io/components/esphome#esphome-changing_node_name).

config_entries.label: Friendly Name
config_entries.description: This name is sent to the frontend and used by Home Assistant as the integration and device name. It also gets prefixed to entity names when needed. While optional, leaving it out can result in less intuitive names and a less polished experience in Home Assistant. Setting a `friendly_name` helps keep things clear, consistent, and easier to manage.

config_entries.label: Area
config_entries.description: The area configuration for this device. This is sent to Home Assistant to specify which area/zone the device belongs to. Can be either a simple string (e.g., `"Living Room"`  ) or a structured format with `id` and `name`.

config_entries.label: Areas
config_entries.description: Additional areas that can be referenced by devices.

config_entries.label: Comment
config_entries.description: Additional text information about this node. Only for display in UI.

config_entries.label: Build Flags
config_entries.description: Extra compiler flags to add to the build. Works on both the PlatformIO and native ESP-IDF backends. See [`build_flags`](https://esphome.io/components/esphome#build_flags).

config_entries.label: Build Path
config_entries.description: Customize where ESPHome will store the build files for your node. By default, ESPHome puts the PlatformIO project it uses to build the firmware in the `.esphome/build/<NODE>` (or into path from `ESPHOME_BUILD_PATH` environment variable if specified) directory, but you can customize this behavior using this option. Official docker image automatically use `/build` folder as default one in case it is mounted to it.

config_entries.label: Compile Process Limit
config_entries.description: The maximum number of simultaneous compile processes to run. Defaults to the number of cores of the CPU which is also the maximum you can set.

config_entries.label: Debug Scheduler
config_entries.description: If set, the scheduler will print debug information about scheduled tasks at log level DEBUG.

config_entries.label: Devices
config_entries.description: Sub-devices to group entities under.

config_entries.label: Environment Variables
config_entries.description: Environment variables to set during the build process. See [`environment_variables`](https://esphome.io/components/esphome#esphome-environment_variables).

config_entries.label: Includes
config_entries.description: A list of C/C++ files to include in the (auto-generated) `main` file. The paths in this list are relative to the directory where the YAML configuration file is located or `<...>` includes. See [`includes`](https://esphome.io/components/esphome#includes).

config_entries.label: Includes C
config_entries.description: The same as `includes` but for files that require C linkage. All includes will be wrapped in `extern "C" {}`. See [`includes`](https://esphome.io/components/esphome#includes).

config_entries.label: Libraries
config_entries.description: A list of libraries to include in the project. See [`libraries`](https://esphome.io/components/esphome#libraries).

config_entries.label: Min Version
config_entries.description: The minimum ESPHome version required to compile this configuration. See [Minimum ESPHome version](https://esphome.io/components/esphome#esphome-min_version).

config_entries.label: Name Add MAC Suffix
config_entries.description: Appends the last 3 bytes of the mac address of the device to the name in the form `<name>-aabbcc`. Defaults to `false`. See [Adding the MAC address as a suffix to the device name](https://esphome.io/components/esphome#esphome-mac_suffix).

config_entries.label: Platformio Options
config_entries.description: Additional options to pass over to PlatformIO in the platformio.ini file. See [`platformio_options`](https://esphome.io/components/esphome#esphome-platformio_options).

config_entries.label: Project
config_entries.description: ESPHome Creator's Project information. See [Project information](https://esphome.io/components/esphome#esphome-creators_project).

config_entries.label: Name
config_entries.description: Name of the project

config_entries.label: Version
config_entries.description: Version of the project
